title: Verify login rate limiting after multiple failed attempts
description: Test that a user's account is temporarily locked out after 5 consecutive failed login attempts.
preconditions: User is on the login page

steps.description: 2. Enter an incorrect password and click 'Login'
3. Repeat step 2 four more times for a total of 5 failed attempts
4. On the 6th attempt, enter the correct credentials and click 'Login'

expected_result: After the 5th failed attempt, an error message indicating a lockout is displayed. The 6th attempt, even with correct credentials, should fail and show a 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED' error. The user should be able to log in successfully after the 15-minute lockout period expires.
